passiveAbilities.name: Guiding Lantern
passiveAbilities.description: When a friendly model enters play via Reanimate or Reanimate Jobie it may be placed in base contact with this model instead of the originator.

passiveAbilities.name: Spade
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Impact Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

passiveAbilities.name: Gravedigger
passiveAbilities.description: The first time each turn this character performs a Harvest action, you may reduce the depth value by 2, instead of 1.

passiveAbilities.name: Keep 'em Fresh
passiveAbilities.description: When this model or a friendly Risen model enters play via Reanimate, it may restore 2 Wds. Other friendly models entering play via Reanimate may restore 1 Wd.

arcaneAbilities.name: Sink Hole
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target suffers X Wds and gains [Slow: This model's Jog actions are limited to 2"], until end of turn. 
Catastrophe: This character suffers 2 Wds.
